trivia_bullets.text: M21's black suite featured a deliberate vampire sub-theme anchored by Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord and Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose at higher rarities; Blood Glutton provides tribal base in Limited. Released during a period when Vampires were a competitive Standard archetype.
sources: coolstuffinc.com: Core Set 2021 Standard Set Review: Black and Multicolor, 2020-07-01

trivia_bullets.text: "Some savor the hunt. I savor the kill." — no speaker attributed. Frames the unnamed depicted vampire as a post-hunt predator rather than a pursuit-minded one, distinguishing appetite from sport.

4/3 lifelink for five mana (4B) is below competitive constructed curve. EDHREC rank 22,871 — very low inclusion, outclassed by more efficient lifelink vampires in Commander. Rated as serviceable but unexciting common in M21 Limited.
sources: coolstuffinc.com: Core Set 2021 Limited Set Review: Black and Multicolor, 2020-06-24

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Anna Podedworna (ArtStation: akreon) is a Polish freelance illustrator with 20+ MTG card credits including Gix, Yawgmoth Praetor and Beseech the Queen. Blood Glutton is among her earlier MTG commissions.

related_cards.name: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
related_cards.note: M21 vampire anchor; Blood Glutton's lifelink triggers Vito's drain ability

related_cards.name: Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord
related_cards.note: vampire planeswalker whose tribal presence shaped M20/M21 black structure

related_cards.name: Vampire of the Dire Moon
related_cards.note: efficient one-drop vampire for cost-efficiency comparison at common
